hero.subtitle: Cozy eco-houses on the southern coast of Crimea — tranquility, sea and nature

welcome.title: Meganom Eco-house
welcome.text: At Meganom, cozy eco-houses made of natural wood with a pine aroma await you. The complex is located near Cape Meganom — one of the most scenic spots on the southern coast of Crimea.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: Meganom Eco-house hotel complex
about.description: At Meganom, cozy eco-houses made of natural wood with a pine aroma await you. The complex is located near Cape Meganom in the village of Mindalnoye, Sudak — one of the most scenic spots on the southern coast of Crimea.

territory.title: Territory
items: Well-maintained grounds with greenery and fish ponds
Named eco-houses made of natural wood
BBQ zone with tandoor and grill
Traditional Russian banya with relaxation area
Outdoor fitness area with pull-up bars
Cape Meganom views from second-floor rooms

services.title: Services
items: Free shuttle to Meganom and Oyster beaches at 8:00, 12:00, and 17:00
Air conditioning and fridge in every room
TV and sofa bed in houses

nearby.title: Nearby
items: Mussel and oyster farm on the beach
Solnechnaya Dolina winery — wine museum, tasting room, shop
Cafes and restaurants: Perchem, Pizza Coffee Sea, Vysota 1234, Slon v Udave

about.allRoomsInclude: All rooms include: Wi-Fi, air conditioning, fridge

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Photos of our complex and surroundings

items.author: Alexey G.
items.text: A wonderful quiet spot by the sea. Crystal clear water, an oyster farm right on the beach. The owners are very hospitable, everything for a comfortable stay.

items.author: Anastasia B.
items.text: Beautiful view of Cape Meganom from the second-floor balcony. The houses are cozy, smell of wood. Well-kept grounds with a pool and playground.

items.author: Dmitry L.
items.text: The owners Ekaterina and Andrey are incredibly welcoming people. The houses are clean with everything you need. The wood-fired banya is amazing!

items.author: Mikhail M.
items.text: Peace, nature, crystal clear sea. They organized a fishing trip — we caught horse mackerel! Shuttle to the beach three times a day, very convenient.

items.author: Olga K.
items.text: Perfect place for a family vacation. Kids loved the pool and fish ponds. Quiet, peaceful, close to nature.

items.author: Sergey V.
items.text: Beautiful place, fresh air with pine scent. Great BBQ area — tandoor and grill. There's a dirt road to the beach, better to drive.
